scripts.install:backend: npm run check:backend:python && node scripts/run-in-dir.mjs backend python -m pip install -e .[dev]
scripts.check:backend:python: python -c "import sys; raise SystemExit(0 if sys.version_info[:2] == (3, 12) else 'Python 3.12 required')"
scripts.check:backend:ruff: node scripts/run-in-dir.mjs backend python -m ruff check .
scripts.check:backend:format: node scripts/run-in-dir.mjs backend python -m ruff format --check .
scripts.check:backend: npm run check:backend:ruff && npm run check:backend:format && npm run check:backend:mypy && npm run check:backend:pytest
scripts.check:frontend: node scripts/run-in-dir.mjs frontend npm run lint && node scripts/run-in-dir.mjs frontend npm run format:check && node scripts/run-in-dir.mjs frontend npm run typecheck && node scripts/run-in-dir.mjs frontend npm test && node scripts/run-in-dir.mjs frontend npm run build
scripts.check: npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend
scripts.ai:prepare: npm run ai:status && npm run ai:context
